prompt: Find GitHub projects related to agent runtime
expectations: Output includes Layer classification (at least L2/L3 labeled)
At least one L2 Runtime layer project identified
Each recommended project has a one-line PM insight
Ends with an overall paradigm assessment
Data metric precision annotated [exact/estimated/trend-based]
At least one growth-anomaly project detected
Each anomaly project labeled with anomaly type (rising star/burst/sustained growth)
Includes key developer activity detection
Each signal given a three-tier assessment (worth deep-diving/watch/ignore)
Lists filtered-out projects with reasons
Output includes complete metadata (stars, forks, commits, contributors)
Issue composition analysis with category percentages
Includes Ecosystem Map (ASCII diagram)
Correctly identified as L2 Runtime
Paradigm assessment explains which stack layer is shifting
L1 and L5 projects filtered out
Only L2/L3/L4 projects retained
1-2 projects with PM value selected
Each selection includes reasoning
Includes brief paradigm signal
